Hi, my name is Ryan and Id like to schedule an appointment on Tuesday at 11am

emailHistory.body:
Appointment Request

Hi, my name is Ryan and Id like to schedule an appointment on Tuesday at 11am

Hi Ryan,

Thank you for reaching out to us! We’d be happy to help you schedule your appointment for Tuesday at 11am. Could you please provide your full first and last name, as well as the reason for your visit? 

Looking forward to hearing from you!

Best,  
The Scheduling Team
hi my last name is Swenson and id like to do a consultation

Hello Ms. Swenson,

Thank you for reaching out to us! We’d be happy to assist you with scheduling your consultation. Could you please provide your full first name? Once we have that, we can get you booked.

Looking forward to hearing from you!

Best,  
The Scheduling Team
My full name is Ryan Swenson

Hi Ryan,

Your appointment is confirmed!

Service: consultation
Date: Tuesday, June 9, 2026
Time: 11:00 AM

We look forward to seeing you. If you need to reschedule or have any questions, just reply to this email.

Best,
The Scheduling Team

Hi I need an appointment. My name is Mike and I want to come in sometime next week.

Hi Mike,

Thank you for reaching out! We’d love to help you schedule your appointment. Could you please provide us with your full first and last name, your preferred appointment date, and your preferred appointment time? 

Looking forward to hearing from you soon!

Best,  
The Scheduling Team
